message:
feat(policy): extend risk scoring and WezTerm integration

policy.rs:
- Expand risk factor evaluation with new categories
- Add weight configuration support
- Implement threshold-based decision routing

wezterm.rs:
- Add pane state assessment for risk scoring
- Integrate alt-screen detection
- Add running command checks

These changes enable nuanced risk-based policy decisions that
consider multiple dimensions of pane and action state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
